Pillar_Narratives.Geopolitical Conflict Intensity: This pillar is critically high due to the direct escalation of hostilities between Iran and regional adversaries. Pillar_Narratives.Currency & Liquidity Pressure: Currency markets are experiencing moderate pressure driven by global uncertainty and the prospect of shifting central bank policies. "Goldman warns of rupee at 95; pressure builds on RBI" illustrates how geopolitical risk and capital flows are directly impacting specific currencies, demanding close central bank attention.
Pillar_Narratives.Sanctions & Regulatory Fragmentation: The intensifying geopolitical conflict creates an environment ripe for further sanctions and regulatory divergence. Pillar_Narratives.Cyber & Infrastructure Threats: Cyber and infrastructure threats are heightened by both state-sponsored activities and the evolving capabilities of AI.
